LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT QUALITY LOAN SERVICE CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO ALL CAUSES OF ACTION THAT ARE THE SUBJECT OF THE DEMURRER. PLAINTIFF IS GRANTED LEAVE TO AMEND, IF SHE CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH, TO ALLEGE THAT SHE HAD AN ENFORCEABLE CONTRACT WITH QUALITY LOAN SERVICE, QUALITY LOAN SERVICE MADE A PROMISE TO HER WHICH IT SHOULD BE ESTOPPED FROM DENYING, AND QUALITY LOAN SERVICE INVADED HER PRIVACY AND ACTED WITH MALICE TO DEFEAT THE QUALIFIED PRIVILEGE OF CIVIL CODE 2924(B). NEW ALLEGATIONS ARE TO BE IN BOLDFACE TYPE. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR # 7077

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-28-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michelle A. Hoskinson, Attorney at Law, 619-6885-4800 ext. 1777, appearing by courtcall, for defendant Quality Loan Service Corporation. No other appearances.

The moving party appeared and the Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT QUALITY LOAN SERVICE CORPORATION's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend as to 11th cause of action. Overruled as to the 6 and 12th cause of action. Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay. Not reported. (D501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-03-2012 Continued To Feb-28-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT QUALITY LOAN SERVICE CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Continued to February 28, 2012 at 9:30am to be heard in department 501. Moving party to provide a courtesy copy of the First Amended Complaint in compliance with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6C by February 10, 2012 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-20-2012 Continued To Mar-23-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-17-2011 Continued To Feb-03-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-16-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. NOAH ZINNER OF HOUSING AND ECONOMIC RIGHTS ADVOCATES,
TEL. NO. (510) 271-8443 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. DEBORAH COCHRAN OF MCCARTHY & HOLTHUS, LLP, TEL. NO. (619) 685-4800 EXT. 1777 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT QUALITY LOAN SERVICE CORPORATION BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT QUALITY LOAN SERVICE CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with ten days leave to amend as to all causes of action that are the subject of the demurrer. Plaintiff is granted leave to amend, if she can do so in good faith, to allege that she had an enforceable contract with Quality Loan Service, Quality Loan Service made a promise to her which it should be estopped from denying, and Quality Loan Service invaded her privacy and acted with malice to defeat the qualified privilege of Civil Code 2924(b). New allegations are to be in boldface type. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn, Court Reporter: Lavena Ward, CSR # 7077 =302/hek

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-14-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -
DEFENDANT QUALITY LOAN SERVICE CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is off calendar. The court did not receive courtesy copies of the moving papers. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
